---
title: "Green Actions"
format: 
    dashboard:
        nav-buttons: [github]
        github: https://github.com/green-actions
theme: minty
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| message: false


### Read in data here
```

## Row {height="20%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total births"


```


```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Cesarean deliveries"


```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Pre-term births"

```
